verses.text: 'I was glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of the LORD,' rejoicing to stand within Jerusalem's gates. Worship is his joy. The godly heart welcomes the call to the house of God.
'I was glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of the LORD,' rejoicing to stand within Jerusalem's gates. Worship is his joy. The godly heart welcomes the call to the house of God.

Jerusalem is a city 'compact together,' where the tribes go up to give thanks and where thrones of judgment are set. It is the centre of worship and justice. God's city unites His people around His name and His law.

Jerusalem is a city 'compact together,' where the tribes go up to give thanks and where thrones of judgment are set. It is the centre of worship and justice. God's city unites His people around His name and His law.

Jerusalem is a city 'compact together,' where the tribes go up to give thanks and where thrones of judgment are set. It is the centre of worship and justice. God's city unites His people around His name and His law.
'Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: they shall prosper that love thee.' He calls for prayer over the city of God. To love and pray for God's people is itself a blessing.
'Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: they shall prosper that love thee.' He calls for prayer over the city of God. To love and pray for God's people is itself a blessing.
For his brethren's sake he will seek the peace and good of the house of the LORD. Love moves him to labour for others. The welfare of God's people and house is the desire of every true worshipper.
